texto: Don't buy the garbage that you're over the hill at fifty. This country makes such a big thing about age particularly if you're a woman. What I think is relevant is your experience what you have to offer. I hope people will recognize that and keep going.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Molly Yard sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Don't buy the garbage that you're over the hill at fifty. This country makes such a big thing abo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, self, confidence, útil em momentos de confidence.
